titleStmt.title: SII 38.192: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 192. (A.R. No. 192 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the south wall, first prākāra, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Rājakēsarivarmaṉ Tribhuvanachchakravartti Kulōttuṅga II Year 3: 1136 A.D.

summary.p: It records the members of the sabhā of Punnaivāyil alias Rājanārāyaṇachaturvēdimaṅgalam in Vikramachōḷa-vaḷanāḍu in Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam, Vaṭṭamaṇi Tiruvēṅkaṭa Bhaṭṭan, Vaṭṭamaṇi Doṇayakkramavittan, and Kumuṇḍili Sūryadēva Bhaṭṭan, the members of the sabhai sold eight thousand five hundred and ninety three and three-fourth kuḻi of land to the temple authorities of Tiruvoṟṟiyūr for burning twenty eight sandhi lamps and one perpetual lamp, after the receipt of price-money from several individuals, Kaḷakkuḍaiyān Tiruchchiṟṟambalam-uḍaiyān, (a resident) of Kaḷakkuḍi in Chōḻa-maṇḍalam, Sēndai Nārāyaṇan Sūṟṟiyadēvaṉ, a merchant of Pāḍi in Ambattūr-nāḍu, Rāmanśiṟiyān Aḻagiyamaṇavāḷaṉ (a native) of Tiruvaḻundūr in Chōḻa-maṇḍalam, the latter's younger brother Śiṟiyān Dēvaṉ and others. The members of the sabhā also figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmeruviya vaḷar tiruponmātu puṇara nāmevu kalaimakaḷ nalam peritu ciṟappa vicaimāmakaḷ velpuyattiruppa yicaiyuñcelli Eṇṭicai viḷaṅka niruparvaṉtiṟaiñca niṇala maṭantaiy tirumaṇami puṇar
n=tana maṇimuṭicūṭi mallaiñālattu palluyirk kellāmellaiyiliṉpa miyalvuṭaṉeta veṇkuṭai niḻaṟṟa ceṅkolocci vāḻip pallūḻiyāḻi naṭappa cempoṉ virasiṁhāsanattu puvaṉa muḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭuThe engraver has forgotten to engrave the word viṟṟiruntaruḷiya
kovirācakecaripaṟmarāna tiripuvaṉacakkaravatti śrī kulottuṅka coḻatevaṟki yāṇṭu 3vatu ( 4ṉāvatu) jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattu vikkiramacoḻavaḷanāṭṭu punnaivāyilāṉa rāja nārāyaṇacaturveti maṅkalattu
sapaikku camain=ta vaṭṭamaṇitiruveṅkaṭapaṭṭaṉum vaṭṭamaṇi toṇayak kiramavittanum kumuṇṭili suriyatevapaṭṭaṉum kumuṇṭili toṇayakkiramavittaṉum Ivvaṇaivomum nilavilaiyāvaṇak kai
m muṭicoḻa primmāta rājavitikku kiḻakku śrīpurān=takaRead parān=takavāykkālukku vaṭakku nālāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟilum Aiñcāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟilum naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa nilattil nāṅkaḷ viṟṟuk kuṭutta nilattukku nilavilaiyāvaṇa
tu Uṭaiyār tiruvoṟṟiyūrāṟku śaṇṭeśuravilaiyāka can=ti viḷakku coḻamaṇṭalattu kaḷakkuṭi kaḷakkuṭaiyān tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyānum tiruppācuravāṇiyan ku(ma)mārantai veyiṭaṅkoṇṭa
malivāṇiyan koṟṟantai Uṭaiyān tiruveḷiyanum Ampattūr nāṭṭu pāṭiyiṉ vāṇiyan ceṉtai nārāyaṇan cūṟṟiyatevaṉum tervāyilil neṭuveṭpurp periyānpaṭṭaṉ Akamuṭaiyāṉ A
laviyum coḻamaṇṭalattut tiruvaḻuntūr rāmanciṟiyān Aḻakiya maṇavāḷanum Ivaṉ tampi ciṟiyāntevaṉum kāñcipurattu cilacaRead cilacin=tāmaṇi-n=tāmaṇip perun=taruvil viyāpāri Aruṅkoṟṟaṉtācaṉ
mpalamuṭaiyār Ekanāyakanum Ivaṉ tampi vaṭukanātanThe two letter ‘tan’ is engraved below. coḻamaṇṭalattut tiruviṭaimarutil viyāpāri teṉṉāvuṭaiyān piccatevanum Ampattūrnāṭṭu tennuḷappiyāṟu veḷḷā
Uttaman Oṟṟik koṇṭānum Ūṟṟukkāṭṭukkoṭṭattu pālaiyūr vāṇiyan virattapiyaṅkan Aruḷānum viḷaṅkāṭupākkattil maṇṇuṭaiyāṉ Oṟṟikkoṇṭāṉum takkolattu vāpa
ṇiyan kuḻapaṉn=taMay be read vāṇiyan kūḻampaṉn=talcelvan tiruvūṟalum pūn=tamalivāṇiyan śrī kaṇṭanātanpaṭṭan viḷakkiraṇṭum veṭṭaṉan=ta Aiññūṟṟeṇmanum tiruveṟkaāṭanum kāñcipurattil Uyyakkoṇṭān perun=ta
ruvil vāṇiyan kuḷattuḻān paḷḷikoṇṭān kuniccāṟupThe letter ‘p’ is engraved below the line.pāṭiyil vāṇiyan kaṇavatiaṅkāṭiyanum tāmarnāṭṭup pātiril tāḻatirakkuṭaiyān tinan tiruvekampamuṭaiyānum tāma(ā)r nāṭṭuc cilacin=tāmaṇi
ccatuṟvetimaṅkalattirukkum putuvūruṭaiyān tillaivaṉamuṭaiyān poṟpaṉaimuttum panmānāṭṭu pan=tiral vāṇiyan kaṇṇantai Aṅkaṭipākkaratevanum maṇavilkoṭṭattup porumpākkattu vāṇi
yaṉ nāṟpākkiḻāntirukkaṇṇicuramuṭaiyāṉaiyum Āmu(ā)ṟRead āmur koṭṭattu ciriceriyil vāṇiyanoṟṟikoṇṭān canti Uṭaiyāṉum Ivvanaivaṟkum Ivvanaivomum viṟṟu Emmillicain=ta poruḷaṟutiyāka
kaikkoṇṭu viṟṟuk kuṭuttom māsabhaiyom Innāṟpāṟ Ellaikku naṭuvupaṭṭa nilaThe letter ‘la’ is engraved below the line.m can=tiviḷakkonṟukku kuḻi Iru nūṟṟaimpatāka viḷakkirupatteṭṭum tirunun=tāviḷa+mIt probably denotes tirununtāviḷakku 1 m
Āka nilam Eṇṇāyirattaiñ ñūṟṟu toṇṇūṟṟu munṟu mukkāl Ippaṭikkivai vaṭṭamaṇit tiruveṅkaṭapaṭṭan Eḻuttu vaṭṭamaThe letter ‘ma’ is engraved below the line.ṇi toṇayakiramavittan Eḻuttu kumuṇṭili cū
ṭṭan Eḻuttu kumuṇṭili toṇayakiramavittan Eḻuttu veṟpuṟattu kan=taya kiramavittan Eḻuttu kūṟpuṟai malaikininṟān Eḻuttu punṉaivāyil Uṭaiyān Utaiya
uṭṭālik kovin=tapaṭṭan Eḻuttu pāracivan campan=tan Eḻuttu civanaāna Āḷuṭainampi Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Iveta IvitIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 38.192 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
